data.title: Bitcoin Price Plunges To 1-Month Low: What Happens Next?
data.description: Bitcoin's (CRYPTO: BTC) dip to as low as $92,805 is the lowest price since Nov. 26, when the apex crypto last traded below $91,000.

data.title: Market Volatility Halts On Soft Inflation Data, Yet Traders Remain Wary Of Fighting The Fed: 10 ETFs Moving Friday
data.description: Markets breathe sigh of relief as Fed's preferred inflation gauge falls below expectations, tempering concerns after hawkish pivot. Stocks see modest gains.

Solana Falls More Than 8% In 24 hours
data.description: Over the past 24 hours, Solana's (CRYPTO: SOL) price has fallen 8.21% to $188.13. This continues its negative trend over the past week where it has experienced a 16.0% loss, moving from $224.06 to its current price.
